row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a curved road with slight rightward drift.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban road scene with trees lining both sides, modern buildings on the right, and a clear asphalt road. A white car is visible ahead in the same lane.
traffic_elements: no traffic lights or signs visible
semantic.visibility_notes: All objects are clearly visible with natural lighting and no occlusions affecting key elements.

logical.object_continuity: White car remains continuously visible throughout frames without abrupt changes.
logical.structure_continuity: Road structure, tree positions, and building facades remain stable and coherent across frames.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily along the curved road.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards; safe following distance maintained to vehicle ahead.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban road layout with trees and buildings, but visual fidelity is reduced. The white car ahead appears distorted or partially missing in some frames.
semantic.visibility_notes: Key object (white car) suffers from generation artifacts — sometimes fragmented, ghosted, or absent. Road texture appears smeared.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion appears generally smooth but exhibits flickering around the white car and roadside elements. Some frames show unnatural warping near building edges.
logical.object_continuity: White car intermittently disappears or morphs between frames, indicating poor temporal coherence for dynamic objects.
logical.structure_continuity: Static structures (trees, buildings) remain mostly continuous but show minor drifting and blurring over time.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle appears to continue forward, though motion may be slightly unstable due to rendering artifacts.
decision.risk_context: Reduced clarity of leading vehicle may impair downstream decision-making if used for planning; no explicit collision risk visible.
